text:
Great Lakes Metal Supply Co.
Precision Flat-Rolled Steel & Aluminum Distribution — Since 1987
Proposal in Response to RFP RM-2026-014 — Meridian Autoparts Inc.
Submitted: June 24, 2026

# Executive Summary

Great Lakes Metal Supply (GLMS) is pleased to submit this proposal to supply Cold-Rolled Steel coil and 5052 Aluminum sheet to Meridian Autoparts' Elkhart facility. GLMS operates two service centers within 120 miles of Elkhart and currently supplies three other Tier-1 automotive stampers on JIT weekly schedules. We are IATF 16949 and ISO 14001 certified and can commit to the full volumes and lead times requested in Section 3 of the RFP.

# Materials Offered & Specifications

| Req #  | Material       | GLMS Offering                                | Meets Spec? |
| ------ | -------------- | -------------------------------------------- | ----------- |
| REQ-01 | CRS Coil       | ASTM A1008 CS Type B, 0.8-2.5mm ±0.025mm     | Yes         |
| REQ-02 | CRS Coil       | Min. yield 280 MPa, width 900-1250mm         | Yes         |
| REQ-03 | Aluminum Sheet | 5052-H32 ASTM B209, 1.0-3.0mm ±0.04mm        | Yes         |
| REQ-04 | Aluminum Sheet | Mill finish, oil-coated, defect rate 0.3%    | Yes         |
| REQ-05 | Both           | MTC issued per lot, EN 10204 Type 3.1        | Yes         |
| REQ-06 | Both           | Full heat/lot traceability via barcode + ERP | Yes         |

# Pricing

| Material      | Grade / Thickness Band | Price (USD/MT, FOB Elkhart) | Pricing Basis           |
| ------------- | ---------------------- | --------------------------- | ----------------------- |
| CRS Coil      | 0.8-1.5mm              | $942 / MT                   | Fixed for 24-month term |
| CRS Coil      | 1.5-2.5mm              | $918 / MT                   | Fixed for 24-month term |
| Aluminum 5052 | 1.0-2.0mm              | $3,180 / MT                 | Fixed for 24-month term |
| Aluminum 5052 | 2.0-3.0mm              | $3,095 / MT                 | Fixed for 24-month term |

# Delivery & Service Levels

GLMS commits to a 98.4% on-time delivery rate (trailing 12-month average, references available), standard lead time of 7 business days, and an expedite option at 2 business days for a 6% surcharge. Non-conformance rate over the past year has been 0.21% by weight, covered under our standard return/credit policy (return authorization within 48 hours, credit issued within 10 business days). GLMS carries $10,000,000 in general liability coverage and maintains a documented business continuity plan including a secondary rolling partner in Ohio for coil supply backup.

# GLMS Certification and Compliance

GLMS holds active IATF 16949:2016 certification (cert #GL-4471, renewed March 2026) and ISO 14001:2015 certification (cert #GL-EM-118). We are fully compliant with Dodd-Frank Section 1502 conflict minerals reporting and will provide a completed CMRT with each shipment cycle. All steel offered is melted and poured in the United States (Indiana and Ohio mills), satisfying Buy America / regional content requirements.

# Payment & Commercial Terms

Standard payment terms: Net 60 from receipt of conforming goods, with a 1.5% discount available for Net 15 payment. GLMS offers a Vendor-Managed Inventory (VMI) program with on-site consignment stock targeted at 2 weeks of coverage, replenished automatically via EDI 830/862 signals from Meridian's MRP system, at no additional carrying cost to Meridian for the first 12 months.

Contact: proposals@glmetalsupply-example.com | Reference: GLMS-RM-2026-014 | Valid 90 days from submission.
